method_summary: DrPO samples candidates from the current generator, ranks them with a target reward, and uses high- and low-scoring samples to synthesize a feature-space update direction consisting of a non-parametric dipole preference field plus reference drift.
key_innovation: Removal of reward-model backpropagation while maintaining single-step inference for one-step generative models, enabling training with large, black-box, or non-differentiable rewards.
best_result: Reduces HPSv3 training computation by 3.51× under matched effective-batch setting
title: Drifting Preference Optimization for One-Step Generative Models
